title: Battle of N'zoth
content:

*''[[Aboukir]]'' *[[Banshee (New Republic)|''Banshee'']] *''[[Fulminant]]'' *''[[Garland]]'' *''[[Thunderhead]]'' *''[[Werra]]'' *''[[Yakez]]'' |casual2=Heavy *All 44 thrustships *All Imperial ships taken over by Imperial captives and taken into hyperspace, including: **[[Aramadia (Super Star Destroyer)|''Aramadia'']] **[[Redoubtable|''Destiny of Yevetha'']] **[[Valorous (Victory-class)|''Devotion'']] **[[Rakehell (Sorannan-class)|''Glory of Yevetha'']] **''[[Harramin]]'' **[[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Pride of Yevetha'']] **[[Imperator (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Splendor of Yevetha'']] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|...I will rip the soft white bellies of your ships open and spill their disgusting entrails for all to see. Your lungs will thirst for air. Your vigorless blood will boil in your ears. Your pleas will go unanswered, and your screams will go unheard. Your bodies will fall into the sun and be consumed.|[[Nil Spaar]]|''[[Tyrant's Test]]''}} The '''Battle of N'zoth''' was the final battle of the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], in which the New Republic implemented [[Operation Strong Hand]] against the [[Yevetha]]. In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], the Yevetha had attacked and massacred all non-Yevethan colonies within the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] during their [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]]. Following a heated diplomatic offensive, the New Republic moved against the Dushkan League following the testimony by Purge survivor [[Plat Mallar]] and the beating of a captive [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] being released on [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]]. After a series of battles, the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]] arrived over the Dushkan capital N'zoth in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] and demanded their surrender and an end to all hostilities. Defiant to the last, Nil Spaar mustered a war fleet including the former Imperial vessels of the [[Black Fleet]]. However, the surviving Imperial captives led by [[Sil Sorannan]]'s [[Camp Pa'aal Squadron]] used a built-in [[slave circuit]] to hijack all Imperial vessels within the Yevethan fleet including Spaar's flagship [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Pride of Yevetha'']]. With the Imperial ships in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] en route for [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], the remaining Yevethan warships refused to surrender. Despite being outnumbered five to one, they fought fanatically to the last forcing the New Republic to completely destroy the enemy fleet. With Yevethan military aggression halted, the New Republic fleet withdrew from the [[N'zoth system/Legends|N'zoth system]]. ==History== ===Background=== {{Quote|We will take away the Yevetha's ability to make war on what they call vermin. Not only because we too, are vermin in their eyes, but because they have shown us an evil heart, and evil must be challenged, even though the cost may be great. Any government that objects to this decision is free to withdraw from this body. And this body is welcome to choose a new President—the day after Nil Spaar is defeated and the Yevetha disarmed.|[[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|}} In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], the Yevethan [[Darama]] [[Nil Spaar]] opened communications with the dominant galactic government in the neighboring [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] – the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Spaar himself arrived on the capital [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] supposedly to seek peaceful co-existence but actually to sow confusion and disruption prior to their planned [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]] of all non-Yevetha in the Koornacht Cluster. Taking advantage of the Republic's lack of information on the Yevetha and [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] plans to seek an ally against the [[Imperial Remnant]], Spaar sought to play into Solo's empathy for species subjugated by the Empire.''[[Before the Storm]]'' Following the destruction of a Republic survey ship by a Yevethan patrol, Spaar initiated several political machinations that threw the Republic government into disarray. With the New Republic forced to withdraw its forces from the Cluster, Spaar returned to N'zoth and launched the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]] against all non-Yevethan colonies in the region. Due to the remote location of the Cluster and the division of the New Republic bureaucracy, Leia was unable to muster enough support for military intervention.''[[Shield of Lies]]'' However, two events changed Republic general sentiment. Firstly, [[Grannan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Plat Mallar]]'s testimony of the Purge in the form of the ''[[Plat Mallar Tapes]]'' helped sway public opinion towards supporting retribution against the Yevetha. Secondly, the [[fleet shuttle]] ''[[Tampion]]'' was captured during a reconnaissance flight within the Cluster's borders. Among the passengers were [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]—Leia's husband and the father of three young children—and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Barth]]. The [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] continued his machinations against the Republic by claiming to an invoke an allegiance with the fictitious [[Grand Imperial Union]]. Attempting to use Solo as a bargaining chip, Spaar demanded that he persuade Leia to withdraw from the Koornacht Cluster permanently. When Solo refused, the Darama killed Barth right before his eyes. After the [[Battle of ILC-905]] destroyed a Yevethan shipyard and several thrustships, Spaar personally beat Solo in a recorded transmission to the New Republic, demanding tersely that they leave Koornacht immediately. Unfortunately for the Dushkan League, the latter incident galvanized and outraged both the New Republic leadership and public who were now committed to supporting a military intervention against the League. Organa Solo, faced with a difficult decision, chose not to order a surrender or withdrawal but instead invoked an official declaration of war on the Yevetha. The New Republic then prepared for a pivotal confrontation, and sent the Fifth Fleet to engage the Yevetha fleet. Solo would later be freed by a group of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] led by [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], who boarded the ''Pride of Yevetha'' and made their way to the cells. The Wookiees accepted the aid of a [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] prisoner on board, who used her illusions to mask the group and to help the remaining prisoners escape. Spaar's [[Breedery|breederies]] were damaged in the escape, infuriating the ''darama''. Spaar was angered even more when he learned that Organa Solo had chosen to fight. ===A Common Enemy=== {{Quote|Looks as though you managed without us, sir.''"
"'' They gave me no trouble.|[[Eistern]] and [[Sil Sorannan]]|}} The full strength of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]] arrived over the orbit of N'zoth. Running before the main body of the fleet were several reconnaissance [[stasis probe]]s dispatched by [[Alpha Blue]] and the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Navy]]. These stasis probes surveyed the expanses of the Yevethan military fleet in preparation for the battle. However, [[Primate/Legends|Primate]] [[Dar Bille]] had warning of the probes and ordered the fleet prepared. As the Yevethan and Republic fleets assembled in the surrounding space, Bille ordered the [[Interdictor/Legends|interdictor]] [[Imperator (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Splendor of Yevetha'']] into position at the helm of the fleet to protect the flagship [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Pride of Yevetha'']]—formerly known as ''Intimidator''. The [[Proctor of Defense]] [[Tho Voota]] commanded the ''Pride of Yevetha'' and its escort ships. In an attempt to reason with the Yevetha, the New Republic [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]] demanded that the Yevetha surrender all occupied territory and free all hostages. Predictably, Spaar rejected these conditions and unleashed a barrage of verbal insults at his opponents to provoke them. However, the Yevetha were hit from a blow that no one suspected. For the war effort, Imperial prisoners from the [[Yevethan Uprising]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] had been dispatched to the ships of the Yevethan fleet. For more than a decade, these prisoners had been interned as skilled slave labor for Yevethan military projects on the moon [[Pa'aal]]. Over time, [[Sil Sorannan]] became the ''de facto'' leader of his fellow Imperial prisoners and formed a secret command group [[Camp Pa'aal Squadron]], plotting to strike against their Yevethan overseers when the moment was right. Throughout those years, Sorannan and his shadow command adopted the Yevethan tactic of pretending to collaborate with the enemy until the time was right to turn the tables on them. They had secretly installed a built-in [[slave circuit]] in the Imperial-designed warships of the Dushkan League. With the Yevetha preoccupied against the New Republic, the moment had come. At the start of the battle, Sorannan and 512 other former Imperial prisoners crewed the ''Pride of Yevetha''. While Nil Spaar verbally denounced his enemies, the Imperials staged their uprising and used the slave circuits to gain control of the Imperial starships in Yevethan hands. Armed with [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and the element of surprise, the Imperials quickly gained the upper hand over the Yevetha. From the bridge of ''Intimidator'', Sorannan informed the New Republic that he and Camp Pa'aal Squadron were rejoining the Empire, and the fleet entered hyperspace for the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. Though the Imperials and the New Republic were still officially enemies, the Imperials had less love for the Yevetha and were glad to help in their defeat. En route to their destination, Sorannan saw to it that [[Nil Spaar]] was deposited into hyperspace aboard an escape pod in revenge for his atrocities. As the escape pod lacked a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], Nil Spaar was trapped in hyperspace, unable to revert to realspace—left for dead. ===The Phantom Fleet=== {{Quote|I will watch to the end. No matter what path you follow, it is important to be reminded what war means.|[[Wialu]]|}} Due to the efforts of Camp Pa'aal Squadron, the New Republic now outnumbered the Yevetha five to one. Prior to the withdrawal of the Imperial ships, the Republic only outnumbered the enemy by three to one. All that remained now were 44 [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustships]] and their [[D-type fighter]]s. This left the Yevetha without a central fleet and without a leader. Undaunted, the Yevetha fleet continued to fight, although without Spaar and the Black Fleet, they were unable to best the New Republic. Despite efforts by A'baht to broadcast a second appeal of surrender to the individual commanders, the Yevetha continued their offensive. Fortunately for the New Republic, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who had been missing throughout the entire conflict to search for his [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|mother]] with a [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-user named [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell|Akanah]], had finally reappeared, accompanied by the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] Force Adepts. The Fallanassi aided the New Republic, using their [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] to craft illusions of a Republic phantom fleet from the flagship ''[[Intrepid]]''. This cut off much of the coordination with other Yevethan warships in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. The Yevethan fleet was severely beaten by the Republic's ships, due mainly to the data gathered by the Republic at the preceding [[Battle of ILC-905]]. Three thrustships opened fire on the phantom elements of [[Task Force Token]] but inflicted no casualties. However, several Fallanassi on the Yevethan vessels died while remaining to create the illusion that there were still hostages onboard. In reality, all the hostages had been evacuated. These Fallanassi were killed during the ensuing fighting. Their deaths were felt by Skywalker and Wialu through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. With the Yevetha preoccupied with the phantom ships, A'baht launched several [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] against the D-type fighter escorts. The Yevetha eventually penetrated the illusion when a senior Fallanassi, [[Wialu]], who was creating the illusions, could not hold up under the strain, causing the illusions to disappear. The thrustships' superior [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] and spherical symmetry allowed them to absorb considerable damage and to focus their firepower on a smaller nature as opposed to the triangular and oval symmetry of the Republic vessels. However, the New Republic made up for this in numerical superiority. The [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Yakez]]'' was destroyed when a pair of enemy warships battered her shields and caused the detonation of the forward batteries, tearing the starship apart. Six other warships ‒ ''[[Aboukir]]'', [[Banshee (New Republic)|''Banshee'']], ''[[Fulminant]]'', ''[[Garland]]'' ''[[Thunderhead]]'' and ''[[Werra]]'' ‒ were destroyed while the [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] ''[[Ballarat]]'' was heavily damaged, destroying several nearby [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. While stationed aboard the cruiser ''[[Mandjur]]'', [[Plat Mallar]] flew his shuttle on three rescue trip to save pilots; recovering a live one and two dead ones. Afterward, Mallar boarded the X-wing of his commanding officer, Captain [[Tegett]] (who was incapacitated) and joined the battle, eventually sacrificing his life ramming a Yevethan ship which was intending to ram ''[[Mandjur]]''. His final act saved hundreds of lives, just as his desperate flight from Polneye guaranteed other worlds near Koornacht would not have to fear a second Great Purge. Near the end, the remaining thrustships launched fighters on kamikaze missions, damaging a number of Republic vessels. Despite the heavy losses, the New Republic fleet destroyed the entire Yevethan fleet present at the battle, ending the Black Fleet Crisis. ===Aftermath=== {{Quote|It has always been enough, in the past, to defeat the enemy. I've never known an enemy who forced me to utterly destroy him.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]]|}} Following the complete military defeat of the Dushkan League, the New Republic disarmed the Yevetha and kept them under close watch. It is unclear how long the New Republic's close watch of the Yevetha continued, but active patrols were removed by at least [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. However, no one actually entered the N'zoth system in that decade, during which the Yevetha built up an even larger force than the Black Fleet, consisting of thousands of [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustships]].''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] ([[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] – [[30 ABY/Legends|30 ABY]]), the [[Galantos Guard]] made a deal with the extragalactic Yuuzhan Vong invaders. In exchange for what the [[Galantos]] believed to be protection from the extragalactic invaders, they informed the Yuuzhan Vong of the brutal Yevetha and the threat they may pose. Taking heed, the Yuuzhan Vong invaded the [[N'zoth system/Legends|N'zoth system]]. The details of the battle may never be known, but if the Yevethan and Yuuzhan Vong tactics say anything, the Yuuzhan Vong destroyed every single ship in the system, and unleashed a horrible orbital bombardment on [[N'zoth]] that rendered the planet a molten wasteland. At the end of the conflict the Yevetha were either extinct or severely endangered. When the men of the Camp Pa'aal Squadron arrived at Byss, they discovered of the planet's destruction by the [[Galaxy Gun]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. Without a clear authority, the remnants of Black Sword Command split up. Most of the warships defected to the New Republic while four [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] joined the Imperial [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]].[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] Meanwhile, two [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] and the experimental warship [[Rakehell (Sorannan-class)|''EX-F'']] joined [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon's]] [[Imperial Remnant]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. However, the ''EX-F'' would meet its destruction during the climatic [[Battle of Anx Minor]]. The ''Intimidator'' left for the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. She was discovered in [[21 ABY/Legends|21 ABY]], wrecked and adrift near the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], with no clear evidence as to what she had encountered. ==Appearances== *''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}} *[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]] *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Imo}} *[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{Mo}} *[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Vortex (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' {{1stID|Battle of N'zoth}} *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *{{FactFile|7|PLA 1-6|Planets of the Core Worlds}} *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Black Fleet}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von N'zoth (17 NSY) |es=Batalla de N'zoth }} {{DEFAULTSORT:N'zoth, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of N'zoth]] [[Category:Battles of the Black Fleet Crisis]]
